DISCOVERY 302, MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFF'S FIRST SET OF FORM INTERROGATORIES - EMPLOYMENT, AND PLAINTIFF'S FIRST SET OF REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT SHALL PROVIDE RESPONSES WITHIN 20 DAYS OF SERVICE OF THE COURT'S ORDER. NO MONETARY SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM: SIGRID IRIAS. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-19-2016 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-23-2015 Set For Trial On May-09-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Interrogatories And Request For Documents And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant
Off Calendar Oct-01-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Richard Nelson of Quintana Hanafi Pungrakearti telephone number 415-200-8550 for Plaintiff.
Mark Rennie of Law Offices of Mark Rennie telephone number 415-981-5400 for Defendant.

The Parties stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem. The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court adopted the tentative ruling. The motion to compel responses to plaintiff's first set of form interrogatories - employment, and plaintiff's first set of requests for production of documents is granted. Defendant shall provide responses within 20 days of service of the court's order. No monetary sanctions are awarded. Order signed in open Court.

Judge Pro Tem: Sigrid Irias. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/JPT)
